Home / Lore / Copyright and Quotation Policy

Publication boundary

Copyright and Quotation Policy

The archive publishes original summaries and evidence locators rather than wholesale copyrighted scripts or media.

Public pages

Collectible pages should publish identifying metadata, original summaries, key lore points and precise locators. Short quotations may be used only when necessary and appropriate.

The public repository must not contain complete game scripts, wholesale collectible transcripts, subtitle dumps, extracted audio or video, or substantial book passages without a separate rights review.

Private research material

Full working transcripts may be used privately for checking names, speakers and claims. They must stay outside the public repository unless their publication has been explicitly approved.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.

Lore Archive / Methodology / Corrections / YouTube @raigulus
